news.title: HSBC upgrades LIC Housing to 'Buy' and raises target price to Rs 610.
news.summary: HSBC upgrades LIC Housing to 'Buy' and raises target price to Rs 610.

news.title:
HSBC upgrades LIC Housing Finance to 'Buy', raises target price to ₹610 citing catalysts like firmer rates, loan disbursements.
Stock trades at ₹500.55, near all-time lows, with a 38% discount to 5-year avg; HSBC sees limited downside risk.
news.summary:
HSBC upgrades LIC Housing Finance to 'Buy', raises target price to ₹610 citing catalysts like firmer rates, loan disbursements.
Stock trades at ₹500.55, near all-time lows, with a 38% discount to 5-year avg; HSBC sees limited downside risk.

news.title:
HSBC upgrades LIC Housing Finance to Buy, raises target price to Rs 610 from Rs 570.
Triggers include firmer rates, faster disbursements, softer yields, 3-4% EPS upgrades, and low valuations.
news.summary:
HSBC upgrades LIC Housing Finance to Buy, raises target price to Rs 610 from Rs 570.
Triggers include firmer rates, faster disbursements, softer yields, 3-4% EPS upgrades, and low valuations.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance appoints J. Sangameswar as CRO with tenure extended till April 2028.
Jimit N. Shah joins as CISO, bringing 15+ years of cybersecurity and risk management expertise.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance appoints J. Sangameswar as CRO with tenure extended till April 2028.
Jimit N. Shah joins as CISO, bringing 15+ years of cybersecurity and risk management expertise.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance board approves Rs. 12,700 Cr borrowing for FY26-27, including Rs. 3,500 Cr via NCDs.
Extension of Chief Risk Officer tenure till April 2028; new CISO appointed for 3 years from April 2026.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance board approves Rs. 12,700 Cr borrowing for FY26-27, including Rs. 3,500 Cr via NCDs.
Extension of Chief Risk Officer tenure till April 2028; new CISO appointed for 3 years from April 2026.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance shows recovery signs with Citi expecting FY26 AUM growth above 6% and Q4 disbursement improvement.
Repricing loans, steady asset quality, and co-lending/fintech tie-ups signal strategic growth focus for LIC Housing Finance.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance shows recovery signs with Citi expecting FY26 AUM growth above 6% and Q4 disbursement improvement.
Repricing loans, steady asset quality, and co-lending/fintech tie-ups signal strategic growth focus for LIC Housing Finance.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.

news.title:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.
news.summary:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance to hold board meeting on 25th March 2026 to approve borrowing budget for FY 2026-27.
Borrowing via loans, debentures, bonds, commercial papers, deposits, foreign currency bonds, and NHB refinance considered.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance to hold board meeting on 25th March 2026 to approve borrowing budget for FY 2026-27.
Borrowing via loans, debentures, bonds, commercial papers, deposits, foreign currency bonds, and NHB refinance considered.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance published Q3 FY2025-26 earnings call transcript on its website.
The call, held on 2nd Feb 2026, provides insights on unaudited quarterly results.
news.summary:

news.title:
Morgan Stanley keeps underweight rating on LIC Housing Finance.
The rating is due to structural growth concerns for the company.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley keeps underweight rating on LIC Housing Finance.
The rating is due to structural growth concerns for the company.

news.title:
LIC Housing Finance Q3 net profit at 13.98B, slightly below 14B YoY, but beats 13.6B estimates.
Q3 revenue rises to 70.5B from 69.5B YoY, reflecting growth in operations.
news.summary:
LIC Housing Finance Q3 net profit at 13.98B, slightly below 14B YoY, but beats 13.6B estimates.
Q3 revenue rises to 70.5B from 69.5B YoY, reflecting growth in operations.

news.title:

The call, hosted by Axis Capital, will feature management discussion and Q&A session.

Trading window for LIC Housing Finance remains closed from 1st Jan to 1st Feb 2026, reopening on 2nd Feb.
